title: Happy Ghast Specimen
description: A Harnessed happy ghast sit on a tissue paper box. This specimen exhibits unique cute cubic structures. Scanned by RealityComposer, this model captures the intricate details of the features and textures. Perfect for display or educational purposes.

hotspots.label: Happy Ghast Face
hotspots.description: The Happy Ghast has closed eyes and a curved smile, giving it a friendly expression. This differs from the standard Ghast, which is usually shown with open eyes and a more distressed or hostile-looking face.
hotspots.prompt: Tell me more about the Happy Ghast's closed-eye smiling face. How does it differ from a normal Ghast?

hotspots.label: Tissue Box Base
hotspots.description: The Happy Ghast specimen rests on a rectangular tissue box. The box provides a stable base and gives viewers a familiar object for understanding the specimen's approximate scale.
hotspots.prompt: Tell me more about the tissue box base beneath the Happy Ghast.

hotspots.label: Ghast Harness
hotspots.description: The harness wraps around the upper portion of the Happy Ghast. It visually identifies this specimen as a harnessed Happy Ghast and adds structure and color to its cubic body.
hotspots.prompt: Explain the harness on this Happy Ghast and what it is used for.
